name: open-agent-connect
author: Sunny Fung
description: Open-source Open Agent Internet runtime, CLI, and host skill packs for MetaBots.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 $(find tests -name '*.test.mjs' ! -path 'tests/cli/runtime.test.mjs' -print) && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/cli/runtime.test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run build:skillpacks && node --test --test-concurrency=1 $(find tests -name '*.test.mjs' ! -path 'tests/cli/runtime.test.mjs' -print) && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/cli/runtime.test.mjs
